snippet.title: The Diplomat cast interviews with Keri Russell, Rufus Sewell, Ato Essandoh, Ali Ahn, and David Gyasi
snippet.description:
The Diplomat cast interviews with Keri Russell, Rufus Sewell, Ato Essandoh, Ali Ahn, and David Gyasi

Kate Wyler (Keri Russell) is the new US Ambassador to the United Kingdom. She was supposed to go to Afghanistan. She’s great in a crisis zone. In a historic home… less so. War is brewing on one continent and boiling over on another. Kate will have to diffuse international crises, forge strategic alliances in London, and adjust to her new place in the spotlight — all while trying to survive her marriage to fellow career diplomat and political star Hal Wyler (Rufus Sewell). From showrunner Debora Cahn (THE WEST WING, HOMELAND), THE DIPLOMAT is a high-stakes, contemporary political drama about the transcendence and torture of long-term relationships, between countries and people. Also starring David Gyasi, Ali Ahn, Rory Kinnear, and Ato Essandoh, with executive producers Debora Cahn, Janice Williams, and Keri Russell.

#thediplomat #kerrirussell #rufussewell

snippet.title: The Diplomat - David Gyasi on preparing for his role, and not changing a word of script
snippet.description:
David Gyasi is interviewed for Netflix's The Diplomat. Attending the New York premiere were Keri Russell (Kate Wyler/ EP), Rufus Sewell (Hal Wyler), David Gyasi (Austin Dennison - British Foreign Secretary), Ali Ahn (Eidra Park - Chief of the CIA London Station), Ato Essandoh (Stuart Hayford - Kate’s Deputy Chief of Mission) and Nana Mensah (Billie Appiah - White House Chief of Staff) along with Creator/Showrunner/Executive Producer Debora Cahn and Executive Producer Janice Williams.
 
Plot: Kate Wyler (Keri Russell) is the new US Ambassador to the United Kingdom. She was supposed to go to Afghanistan. She’s great in a crisis zone. In a historic home… less so. War is brewing on one continent and boiling over on another. Kate will have to diffuse international crises, forge strategic alliances in London, and adjust to her new place in the spotlight — all while trying to survive her marriage to fellow career diplomat and political star Hal Wyler (Rufus Sewell). From showrunner Debora Cahn (THE WEST WING, HOMELAND), THE DIPLOMAT is a high-stakes, contemporary political drama about the transcendence and torture of long-term relationships, between countries and people. 

The series will be released on the 20th of April, 2023.

snippet.title: A Real Diplomat Reviews Netflix's "The Diplomat"
snippet.description:
Did you watch Netflix’s The Diplomat? Senior Foreign Service Officer Kristin Kane reviews the show, offering her perspective and shares what is fact and what is more fiction. And if you’re interested in becoming a diplomat and a career in diplomacy, go to careers.state.gov.

0:00 Intro
0:16 Deputy Chiefs of Mission
0:36 Fact Checking
1:19 Ambassador - DCM relationship
2:15 Residences
2:37 Diplomatic credentials
3:27 Presidential visits
4:20 Wardrobe and Protocol
5:16 Conclusion
----------
Under the leadership of the President and Secretary of State, the U.S. Department of State leads America’s foreign policy through diplomacy, advocacy, and assistance by advancing the interests of the American people, their safety and economic prosperity. On behalf of the American people we promote and demonstrate democratic values and advance a free, peaceful, and prosperous world.

The Secretary of State, appointed by the President with the advice and consent of the Senate, is the President's chief foreign affairs adviser. The Secretary carries out the President's foreign policies through the State Department, which includes the Foreign Service, Civil Service and U.S. Agency for International Development.

snippet.title: Rufus Sewell Found the Key to the Political Drama The Diplomat in Screwball Comedy: TheWrap Magazine
snippet.description:
Apart from its geopolitical intrigue, “The Diplomat” is a series about a smart, driven pair of overachievers who can be a great team or can end up wrestling in the bushes while she swings tree branches at him.

At the heart of the show is the relationship between Keri Russell’s Kate and Rufus Sewell’s Hal, a married couple of diplomats whose marriage may or may not be ending, but is both provocative and amusing with its nonstop mixture of flirting and fighting.

For Sewell, a 55-year-old British actor whose previous work has included “A Knight’s Tale,” “The Father” and “The Man in the High Castle,” the series supplied the kind of blend he’s been looking for through most of his career.

#thediplomat #rufussewell #kerirussell

snippet.title: Check the Boxes - What Beth Azor Looks for when Investing in Shopping Centers
snippet.description:
My investing formula for success? 🏪💰

It's all about the right location, right tenants, and right opportunity. Here's what I look for when purchasing a shopping center:

🚗 Parallel to High Traffic Street: Ensuring great visibility and exposure for tenants is key. I prefer strip centers that run parallel to busy streets to guarantee maximum visibility.

✅ 100% Leased: A fully leased shopping center often indicates low rents and a stable, satisfied tenant base. It's a sign of a thriving community and gives me confidence in the investment.

🤝 Long-term Ownership: If the previous owner has maintained relationships with tenants for 10, 15, 20 years, it shows trust, satisfaction, and a good cash flow.

💸 High Income Markets: Targeting areas with high disposable income ensures that the shopping center will attract the right clientele. High income and high daytime population? That's a big YES from me.

🏫 Nearby Amenities: Having a college, hospital, and a bustling daytime population nearby creates opportunities for tenants to serve lunch and dinner. Score!

📍 Visibility and Exposure: No corners to lease and great visibility ensures what tenants like, making it an ideal investment.

I've checked all these boxes time and again, and the result?

Success.

Thanks to Whitney Sewell from @tresspodcast for having me on. Love talking about retail leasing, retail real estate, and investing!

snippet.title: Did I Do Something Wrong? Pearl 2022 Mia Goth David Corenswet #pearl2022
snippet.description:
Pearl (subtitled An X-traordinary Origin Story) is a 2022 American slasher film directed by Ti West, co-written by West and Mia Goth, who reprises her role as the title character, and featuring David Corenswet, Tandi Wright, Matthew Sunderland and Emma Jenkins-Purro in supporting roles. A prequel to X (2022) and the second installment in the X film series, it serves as an origin story for the title villain, whose fervent aspiration to become a movie star led her to committing violent acts on her family's Texas homestead in 1918. Trapped on an isolated farm, Pearl must tend to her ailing father under the watch of her mother. Lusting for the glamorous life she's seen in movies, Pearl's temptations and repressions collide.Pearl is undoubtedly a psychopath. She enjoys hurting defenseless beings; befriending predatory beings excites her; she relishes in the idea of her parents demise to perpetuate her goals, and she impulsively destroys anything obstructing said goals.
